Control Requirement: Replay-resistant authentication is enforced for all privileged users and relevant access paths.
3PAO Review Note: Shows org-level 2FA requirement. This is a prerequisite

Control Requirement: SAML SSO is configured for the organization and used as the front door to GitHub.
Acceptance Criteria: Credential authorizations are present and match the population of authorized users / tokens / SSH keys.
3PAO Review Note: Demonstrates SAML SSO authorization management and token/SSH authorization control.

Control Requirement: Authentication and authorization events are recorded and reviewable.
Acceptance Criteria: Audit log exists is recent and includes auth-related actions.
3PAO Review Note: Use filters and samples to show auth-related events such as SAML token or login events.

Control Requirement: The organization can review SAML SSO authorizations for credentials used in the org.
Acceptance Criteria: SAML auths retrievable by org owner.
3PAO Review Note: If SAML SSO is not enabled the artifact will be empty or error treat as a gap.

Control Requirement: Audit logs can be forwarded to an external data management system or SIEM.
Acceptance Criteria: Streaming configuration exists or logging pipeline is documented.
3PAO Review Note: Enterprise owners can stream audit and Git events to external systems including Splunk and Azure Event Hubs.

Control Requirement: SIEM ingest path is configured for GitHub audit logs.
Acceptance Criteria: Events are queryable in SIEM and retained per policy.
3PAO Review Note: GitHub Enterprise Audit Log connector ingests into GitHubAuditLogsV2_CL; Splunk can receive audit streams via supported GitHub streaming endpoints.
